caption: A man stands behind a music stand and a microphone in a room with vertical wooden slats in the background. He is wearing a white long-sleeved shirt under a dark vest with decorative embroidery and glasses. He appears to be performing or speaking to an audience, as the backs of several people's heads are visible in the foreground. The audience members are wearing various colors, including purple and blue. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in place, though he adjusts his glasses with his right hand in one instance. A microphone on a stand is positioned in front of him. The text "ORCA" is visible on the right side of the scene. The camera angle remains static, capturing the man from the waist up and the heads of the listeners in front of him.
